creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 252569
Add sysutils/py-pyinfra ports, 3.0.2 release, with tests, Makefile linted.

Ok, port linters and formatters are happy now, added TEST_DEPENDS (for the unit tests, no code formatting and type tests). Some tests are explicitly ignored, because they require docker or an installation of pyinfra first.

I didn't change the conditional dependencies as explained in the previous comment.
